homeHeroLine1.zh: 构建更好的浏览器扩展

homeHeroTagline.en: Browser extension development framework built on Rsbuild. One config for Chrome and Firefox; dev with Hot Reload, build and ship.
homeHeroTagline.zh: 加速你的浏览器插件开发。基于 Rsbuild，快速，简单，自由。

homeFeaturesSectionSubtitle.en: Extenzo makes extension development fast and predictable.
homeFeaturesSectionSubtitle.zh: Extenzo 让扩展开发更快、更可预期。

homeBlock1Desc.en: Run extenzo dev for watch + Hot Reload; the extension loads in the browser and updates on every change.
homeBlock1Desc.zh: 运行 extenzo dev 即 watch + Hot Reload；扩展在浏览器中加载，content_script 与 background 均能极速HMR。

homeBlock2Desc.en: One command to build and zip; same Rsbuild pipeline for production-ready output.
homeBlock2Desc.zh: 使用 build 将自动打包 zip 格式；与生产一致的 Rsbuild 流水线。

homeFeaturesRow1Subtitle.en: Hot reload, multi-browser support, and minimal config so you can ship extensions faster.
homeFeaturesRow1Subtitle.zh: 热更新、多浏览器支持与极简配置，助你更快交付扩展。

homeFeaturesRow2Subtitle.en: Structured meta, terminal errors, and skills — so agents can understand and extend your extension.
homeFeaturesRow2Subtitle.zh: 结构化 meta、终端错误输出与 Skills，让 AI 能理解并扩展你的扩展。

homeFeature1Title.en: Same experience in dev and production
homeFeature1Title.zh: 一流的开发与生产体验

homeFeature1Details.en: Full-bundle mode minimizes the dev/prod gap; Rsbuild + build watch give hot reload with consistent output.
homeFeature1Details.zh: 底层基于 Rsbuild。Full bundle 模式保证开发与打包体验一致且不丢失极致的性能。

homeFeature2Details.en: Vanilla, Vue, React, Preact, Svelte, Solid, or React+UnoCSS — use what you like.
homeFeature2Details.zh: 你可以用 Vanilla，也可以使用 Vue、React、Preact、Svelte、Solid 或 React+UnoCSS 等框架。

homeFeature3Details.en: Install extenzo, add exo.config.ts at the root, and start — no complex setup.
homeFeature3Details.zh: 安装 extenzo 后，在根目录添加 exo.config.ts 即可开始，无需复杂的配置即可完成插件开发。

homeFeature4Details.en: Support for mainstream Chromium-based browsers and Firefox; auto-detect install path and launch.
homeFeature4Details.zh: 支持主流 Chromium 系浏览器和 Firefox。无需配置即可自动识别浏览器默认安装地址并启动。

homeFeature5Details.en: Dedicated plugin for extension reload; content_script and background both hot-update.
homeFeature5Details.zh: 使用独立 Reloader 控制扩展更新，不仅快速，content_script 和 background 均能实现极速HMR。

homeFeature6Details.en: Built-in createContentUI for Iframe, ShadowDom, or inline content.
homeFeature6Details.zh: 提供了内置的 createContentUI 方法，可轻松集成 Iframe、ShadowDom 和原生内容。

homeFeature7Details.en: With --debug, terminal error output; capture all errors without opening DevTools, ready for Ask AI in any editor.
homeFeature7Details.zh: 使用 --debug 时启用终端错误输出。无需在浏览器操作即可掌握插件所有报错信息，方便你在任何 Editor 中直接 Ask AI。

homeFeatureBundleAnalysisDetails.en: Built-in support for Rsdoctor and Rstest to quickly complete bundle analysis, unit and e2e testing.
homeFeatureBundleAnalysisDetails.zh: 内置支持 Rsdoctor 与 Rstest，可快速完成打包分析及单元、e2e 测试。

homeFeature8Details.en: Running build automatically produces a zip of the extension.
homeFeature8Details.zh: 构建时自动输出扩展 zip 包，便于安装与分发。

homeFeature9Details.en: File-based entry discovery or entry config; flexibility for complex projects.
homeFeature9Details.zh: 支持基于文件自动识别入口，也支持通过 entry 字段配置入口。最大程度为复杂项目提供灵活性。

homeFeatureMetaDetails.en: Structured meta output for AI and tooling consumption.
homeFeatureMetaDetails.zh: 输出结构化 meta，便于 AI 与工具消费。

homeFeatureSkillsDetails.en: Extensible skills for agents and automation.
homeFeatureSkillsDetails.zh: 可扩展的 Skills，支持 Agent 与自动化。
